case_number: Crl. Misc. Application No. S-238 of 2023

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No. S-238 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Main Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 11-03-2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Sikandar Ali Siddiqui, Advocate is holding brief on behalf of Syed Nadeem Hyder Shah, counsel for applicant and requests for adjournment on the ground that he is busy before principal seat of this Court at Karachi. Learned counsel, who is holding brief on behalf of applicant’s counsel, has refused to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
